title: Cobalt Mod - Think blue
description: This mod adds the ore Cobalt and a lot more things themed around it
body:
About

This mod adds the ore Cobalt and a lot more things themed around it The initial mod came out back in 2012 and since then it was more of a private passion project to tinker around with ideas. Therefore it might not look or feel like any of the other smaller projects. Critique is always welcome.

Info

The latest version is a complete rewrite of the mod, and therefore may not include all of the features described below, or may not include them at all, or may include them in a modified form.

Feature Breakdown

Around 52 Items and 52 Blocks 19 new Advancements: - Holy ore - Tasty Apple? - Time to block the Cobalt - ... 5 new Biomes + 2 Dimensions - Biomes "Cobex Forest", "Blue Mountains", "Deep Swamp", "Tall Forest", "Highlands" - Spreading plague - Temple to create a bridge between the dimensions, smaller dungeons Several new mobs - Cobalt Zombie - Cobalt Guardian - Cobalt Guardian Minion - Blue Buddy - Blue Slime

Changes as of v3.0.0

- Only 1 dimension. - Since the second dimension was basically like the [Deep Dark](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Deep_Dark), it will now exist as such. Therefore the main Dimension has a deeper layer with different blocks, etc. - Cobalt Temple might be replaced with Portal Structure - As of now i've implemented a similar Structure to the vanilla [Ruined Portal](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Ruined_Portal)

Videos

Old video of the dimension landscape Playlist of related videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLE5F6CC6421CA4461
